questions.question: As of May 2025, what is the total number of Higher Education Institutions (HEIs) in India?
As per the Press Information Bureau release dated March 10, 2025, what is a major feature of the Bills of Lading Bill, 2025?
questions.option_1: Mandating insurance for all cargo vessels
questions.option_2: Replacing paper bills with biometric authentication
questions.option_3: Fixing freight rates for maritime shipments
questions.option_4: Modernising India's maritime laws by replacing the old law

questions.question: What was India's total non-fossil fuel installed capacity as of November 2024, as per the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy?
The 'Handball at School' initiative launched in 2025 to promote handball at the grassroots level in India is a collaboration between which organisations?
questions.option_1: International Handball Federation and Asian Handball Federation
questions.option_2: All India School Sports Federation and Handball Association of India
questions.option_3: Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports and National Handball Federation
questions.option_4: Indian Olympic Association and Sports Authority of India

questions.question: At the 2025 British Book Awards gala in central London, who received the Freedom to Publish award?
Which city hosted the International Air Transport Association (IATA) Annual General Meeting and World Air Transport Summit in June 2025?
Which of the following joint military exercises between India and Mongolia commenced its 17ᵗʰ edition in Ulaanbaatar on 31 May 2025?
Which hazardous pesticide was agreed to be eliminated under the Stockholm Convention held in Geneva in 2025?
Infrastructure has been a key pillar for sustained growth. Which initiative was launched in 2020 to coordinate infrastructure projects in India?

Which of the following countries withdrew from the OCED Global Tax Deal in January 2025?
Which city hosted the inaugural World Audio Visual & Entertainment Summit (WAVES) in May 2025?
In January 2025, the Gujarat government declared the 'Inland Mangrove of Guneri', located in which district, as its first Biodiversity Heritage Site (BHS)?
Who among the following was conferred with a Padma Vibhushan Award 2025 (Posthumous) in the field of literature in April 2025?
As announced in January 2025, which Indian pharmaceutical company is set to manufacture Paracetamol domestically?
As in May 2025, who was the Chairman of the National Highways Authority of India (NHAI)?
Which of the following exercises was jointly conducted by the Indian Army and NDRF on May 2025 as a large-scale humanitarian assistance and disaster relief (HADR) simulation?
As per April 2025 announcement, CRPF decided to raise which battalion for counter terror operation in Jammu and Kashmir?
Which company signed a ₹1,220 crore deal for Software Defined Radios with Defence Ministry in February 2025?
Which of the following players broke National Record in Women’s 3000 m steeplechase at Doha Diamond League 2025 and qualified for the World Athletics Championships?
DIGIPIN, an open-source nationwide geo-coded addressing system, is an alphanumeric code of how many characters based on latitude and longitude coordinates?
After his election as the first American pope, what papal name did Cardinal Robert Prevost choose?
On May 20, 2025, the Supreme Court has made minimum how many years of legal practice mandatory for entry into the judicial service?
Who won Best Supporting Actress for her role in Baby Reindeer at the BAFTA TV Awards held at London's Royal Festival Hall in May 2025?
